name: GI Engineering Solutions Limited
summary: GI Engineering Solutions Limited provides engineering-based services in Asia. The company offers civil engineering, land planning, land surveying, and landscape architecture services. It provides offshore engineering services, such as residential design for planned unit developments, single family subdivisions, traditional condominiums, apartment complexes, single family site condominiums, and manufactured housing communities; and commercial/industrial design services for industrial subdivisions and site condominiums, commercial and industrial site plans, and marinas. The company also offers soils/site evaluations, septic system monitoring, cluster systems, sanitary sewer systems, septic system designs, package treatment plants, water distribution systems, arsenic removal, and water treatment services. In addition, it provides master planning services for parks, playgrounds, golf courses, pedestrian and vehicular campuses, waterfronts, marinas, and water features, as well as construction supervision services, site evaluation studies, and tree surveys. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Mumbai, India.
